subject: feat(icons): add SVG source icon and sharp generation pipeline
body:
Replaces the solid-color placeholder PNGs with an actual S lettermark
icon for Sancio. Follows the glow-props pattern: single SVG source at
public/icon-source.svg, converted to sized PNGs via scripts/generate-icons.mjs
using sharp.

Generated icons: favicon.png (48px), pwa-192x192.png, pwa-512x512.png,
pwa-maskable-512x512.png, pwa-1024x1024.png.

Also fixes the manifest icon entries — splits the combined "any maskable"
purpose into separate entries with individual purpose values, which some
tools and browsers handle more reliably. Switches favicon from .ico to
.png for consistency with the generation pipeline.

Tags: icons, pwa, branding, sharp, glow-props
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: pwa-hardening
Semver: minor
